title: AIIMS INICET Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: AIIMS INICET Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: AIIMS INICET Result 2026 for PG Medical Courses will be released anytime (today) on the official website - aiimsexams.ac.in. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the AIIMS INI-CET result.

content.text: AIIMS INICET Result 2026 is expected to be released anytime today for candidates who appeared in the Institute of National Importance Combined Entrance Test for PG medical courses. The result will be announced for courses including MD, MS, DM, MCh, and MDS. AIIMS INICET Result 2026 will be released online on the official website - https://www.aiimsexams.ac.in.

Once released, candidates will be able to check their AIIMS INICET 2026 result by logging in using their Registration ID and Password. The scorecard will include important details such as percentile, rank, and qualifying status. Candidates are advised to verify all details carefully and contact the exam authority in case of any discrepancies.

AIIMS is set to release the INICET 2026 result for PG medical entrance courses anytime today on its official website. Candidates will be able to check their results for MD, MS, DM, MCh, and MDS programs by logging into the portal using their credentials.

rows: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS)

content.text: AIIMS will activate the direct link to check INICET 2026 results shortly on its official website. Candidates can access their PG entrance exam results instantly once released through the link provided below.

sections.heading: Steps to Check AIIMS INICET Result 2026

items: Click on the "Results" section on the homepage
Find and select AIIMS INICET 2026 Result link
Enter your Registration ID and Password
Your result will appear on the screen
Download and save the result for future use
